description: List knowledge documents in the unified knowledge store. Use this to browse the four top-level types: design, memory, skill, and reference. Returns plain text with one canonical type-prefixed `.md` document path per line, such as `skill/build-pipeline.md`.

pathPrefix.description: Optional type-prefixed directory path prefix such as `design/`, `design/combat/`, or `skill/unity/`. Directory prefixes do not end with `.md`. When omitted, all knowledge types are listed.

includeHidden.description: When true, include search-only documents that are hidden from the injected knowledge structure. Skill workflows that do not allow model recall remain hidden.
